cells.rationale: Introduces a new bounded retry state-machine into the autopilot finalize/recover reconciler (autopilot-worker.ts + baseline-worker.ts): a per-key load-suspect memo that must be bounded (no infinite retry), reset on green/named-red, and live in producers/workers and NEVER in a deterministic-replayed fold. That is a subtle correctness invariant on keeper's most delicate, contract-shaped operational-state surface where a wrong abstraction (memo placement, key, reset condition) propagates past the task; clears the opus gate. xhigh fits new-pattern introduction touching operational state; not max since the root cause is named and this is not hypothesis-free debugging.
